user_system_path: Scout money-move seam (#494): turn the hands on for ONE real inward loop on REAL data. Value = frequency of real acts that landed x load removed per act. The Scout build is DONE and inward (stages 0-5 + the inward retarget are merged); the hands have never gripped real data (scout_drive_chunks empty, tkg_signals encrypted, deployed flag-OFF). The remaining work is owner-gated runtime activation the agent sandbox cannot perform: set Vercel prod secrets/flags, run the paid Drive index, run one real review-gated Slack delivery grounded in the owner's own data, judged by gut >=3x/week and labeled owner-only. This control-plane PR repoints source truth to #494 after the connector-freshness seam (#507) merged via PR #508 (squash 9bdf478) and auto-closed, which would otherwise red the continuity gate (active_issue pointed at a closed issue). LANDING #500 already shipped (PR #501).
allowed_files_raw: This PR is a governance-only control-plane repoint touching ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, ACTIVE_SEAM_STATE.json, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, .foldera-contract.json. The #494 seam itself, once activated, lives in lib/scout/** and app/api/cron/scout/** with coupled tests; activation proper is owner-gated runtime (no repo change).
forbidden_files_raw: No dashboard, Stripe, schema/migration, or secrets changes. No external opportunity-hunting, no new detector/score/channel without a real runtime consumer in the same change, no auto-send.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck
required_browser_proof: Scout activation is owner-gated runtime truth the agent sandbox cannot reach: set VOYAGE_API_KEY + flip SCOUT_ENABLED/SCOUT_RAG_ENABLED/SCOUT_WEB_ENABLED/ALLOW_PAID_LLM/SCOUT_DELIVERY_ENABLED in Vercel prod and redeploy; GET /api/cron/scout/index-drive then /api/cron/scout/deliver (CRON_SECRET bearer); judge >=3x/week. Absent owner activation the live money-move claim is BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT.
acceptance_condition: Control plane points at the open Scout seam #494 consistently across ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, .foldera-contract.json, ACTIVE_SEAM_STATE.json; gate:continuity green with active_issue #494. The Scout money-move itself is proven only by owner-gated runtime activation (one real inward loop on real data), not by this repoint.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/dashboard, app/api/stripe, supabase/migrations
Scout flags remain OFF in prod until owner activation
no external opportunity-hunting or auto-send introduced
stop_condition: Repoint lands as a draft PR on claude/repoint-control-plane-494 targeting #494; gate:continuity + typecheck green. Scout activation remains owner-gated (BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT). Separately tracked: #509 account split-brain (owner decision) and the owner Google re-consent.
next_command: Owner: merge this repoint, then run the #494 owner-gated activation checklist (Vercel secrets/flags -> paid Drive index -> one real Slack delivery). Also re-consent Google on the owner account to restore the sync the test persona was rotating away (#509).
